query:
-- Services with zero revenue grouped by supplier/platform
SELECT 
  s.supplierName,
  s.billingPlatform,
  COUNT(*) as serviceCount,
  SUM(s.monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  SUM(s.monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.status NOT IN ('inactive', 'terminated')
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.customerExternalId != ''
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue = 0 OR s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL)
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
GROUP BY s.supplierName, s.billingPlatform
ORDER BY totalCost DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Overall picture: matched vs unmatched revenue
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalServices,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withRevenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue = 0 OR monthlyRevenue IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zeroRevenue,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue
FROM services 
WHERE status NOT IN ('inactive', 'terminated')
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != '';
